name: Zefraniu, Secret of the Yang Zing
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>秘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セフィラシウゴ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Yang Zing" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card is Pendulum Summoned, or when this card is destroyed by battle or card effect while in your Monster Zone: You can add 1 "Yang Zing" or "Zefra" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Zefraniu, Secret of the Yang Zing" once per turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Yang Zing" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.
mnst_eff: When this card is Pendulum Summoned, or when this card is destroyed by battle or card effect while in your Monster Zone: You can add 1 "Yang Zing" or "Zefra" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Zefraniu, Secret of the Yang Zing" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Pendulum Summoned, or when this card is destroyed by battle or card effect while in your Monster Zone: You can add 1 "Yang Zing" or "Zefra" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Zefraniu, Secret of the Yang Zing" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
